topic: A person unboxing the latest iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table, front view.

parsed_generation.script:
[00:00-00:02] Shot 1: Front view: A person unboxing the latest iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table - Camera: Front, Angle: Eye-level, Framing: Medium, Movement: Static, Subject: single.
[00:02-00:05] Shot 2: Front view: The person opens the box, lifting the lid to begin revealing the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro - Camera: Front, Angle: Eye-level, Framing: Medium, Movement: Slow push-in, Subject: single.
[00:05-00:08] Shot 3: Front view: The person presents the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro in their hand, facing the camera with the wooden table in frame - Camera: Front, Angle: Eye-level, Framing: Medium close-up, Movement: Static, Subject: single.
parsed_generation.narration: Shot 1 shows a person in a front-facing position at a wooden table, starting the unboxing of the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro, establishing a direct, personal connection with the viewer. Shot 2 captures the moment the lid lifts, signaling the product emerging from its packaging and building anticipation while keeping the focus on the single subject. Shot 3 frames the reveal as the device rests in the person's hand, the Desert Titanium finish catching light, and the front-view setup keeps the audience engaged with the person rather than a distant shot. Together, the three shots present a concise, authentic unboxing moment of the latest iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table.

feedback: The script stays on topic (unboxing an iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table) and uses timestamped shots with clear front-view framing. However, it diverges from the gold standard by not adopting the top-down box reveal and macro/detail shots. To better align, adopt a four-shot sequence that mirrors the gold standard (top-down sealed box, lid lift revealing the phone face-down, side-angle lift showing the phone with cables/docs, macro peel of the screen), incorporate varied angles, and add tactile SFX cues for a richer unboxing rhythm.
strengths: Clear, timestamped structure with a focused subject
Explicit mention of Desert Titanium color and wooden table setting
fixes: Adopt the four-shot progression from the gold standard (top-down seal, lid removal reveal, side lift, macro peel)
Use varied camera angles (top-down, side-angle, macro) and explicit close-ups; avoid over-reliance on front-eye-level framing
Enhance visual detail with lighting cues, reflections on Desert Titanium, and visible packaging elements; consider adding SFX cues
